---
title: "Doctor-Patient Appointment System – PostgreSQL Database Design"
format: html
toc: true
---

## Objective
Design a robust, normalized, and production-ready database for a clinic/hospital appointment system.

## Core Requirements
- Prevent double booking  
- Support cancellation & rescheduling  
- Full audit trail  
- Fast queries for doctor availability

## Final ERD
![ER Diagram](images/appointment_erd.png)

## Key Tables (3NF)
```sql
patients, doctors, specialties, schedules, 
appointments (status: booked, completed, cancelled, no-show),
appointment_history (audit log)
